purpose: Canonical generation-oriented save specifications for original-runtime proof work.
notes: Treat these profiles as state specifications first and save-file examples second.
A profile should remain useful even if none of its example .LBA files exist locally.
For Neighbour's House evidence, room name alone is insufficient; use room plus progression family.
Visual verification is a Codex/manual screenshot comparison step, not an automated image-matching pass.
Only put screenshot-verifiable cues in visual_verification; keep story-era assertions in generation_spec.
Keep distinct room stages of the same story arc in separate profiles when the proof target changes across Tavern, sewers, treasure rooms, or the actual Sendell's Ball room.

profiles.proof_goal: Early-game baseline contrast for the Scene11 ownership/mismatch lane.

story_prerequisites: Twinsen is still in the early Citadel storyline
The save is before the later wizard, Zeelich-return, or captured-world branches
hero_state: Keep the save's natural early-game body/comportment and inventory
generation_spec.interaction_boundary: Prefer saving immediately after entering the room, before additional room-specific interactions.

visual_verification.validation_method: Load the save, capture the loaded-scene screenshot, and have Codex compare it against these cues in-chat before the save is treated as valid proof input.
visual_verification.screenshot_step: After loading the save, capture a screenshot before additional room-specific interactions.
expected_visual_cues: Twinsen appears in a non-wizard presentation
mismatch_examples: Twinsen is visibly in wizard robes
The loaded room is not Neighbour's House

operator_generation_instructions: Load or play to an early-game Citadel state.
Enter Neighbour's House.
Create the save inside the room before doing extra room-specific actions.
Record the chapter/arc and Twinsen's visible outfit if known.
After loading the save for proof work, take a screenshot and compare it against this profile's visual verification cues.

profiles.proof_goal: Wizard-era Scene11 comparison for the ownership/mismatch lane.

story_prerequisites: Twinsen has completed the School of Magic sequence or is in its immediate aftermath
Wizard costume or equivalent wizard-state branch is active
hero_state: Prefer Twinsen in wizard robes or equivalent wizard form
Keep natural inventory and magic state for this era
generation_spec.interaction_boundary: Prefer saving inside the room without introducing extra ad hoc interactions for the experiment.

visual_verification.validation_method: Load the save, capture the loaded-scene screenshot, and have Codex compare it against these cues in-chat before the save is treated as valid proof input.
visual_verification.screenshot_step: After loading the save, capture a screenshot before changing outfit or leaving the room.
expected_visual_cues: Twinsen is visibly in wizard robes or equivalent wizard disguise
mismatch_examples: Twinsen is not in wizard robes
The loaded room is not Neighbour's House

operator_generation_instructions: Reach the wizard-disguise part of the game around the School of Magic / Hacienda transition.
Keep Twinsen in wizard robes if possible.
Enter Neighbour's House and save inside the room.
Record that this is the wizard-era family.
After loading the save for proof work, take a screenshot and compare it against this profile's visual verification cues.

story_prerequisites: Twinsen has returned to Twinsun from Zeelich
The kidnapped-children or equivalent late-house story branch is active
hero_state: Twinsen on foot in the save's natural returned-to-Twinsun state
Preserve natural inventory, body, comportment, and magic state
generation_spec.interaction_boundary: Prefer saving soon after entering the room so the room snapshot stays close to the story branch entry state.

visual_verification.validation_method: Load the save, capture the loaded-scene screenshot, and have Codex compare it against these cues in-chat before the save is treated as valid proof input.
visual_verification.screenshot_step: After loading the save, capture a screenshot before extra room-local interactions.
mismatch_examples: The loaded room is not Neighbour's House

operator_generation_instructions: Reach the post-Zeelich returned-to-Twinsun portion of the story.
Go to Neighbour's House during the kidnapped-children or equivalent late-house branch.
Create the save inside the room with the natural late-game state intact.
Record that this is the returned-house family.
After loading the save for proof work, take a screenshot and compare it against this profile's visual verification cues.

profiles.proof_goal: Captured-world family confirmation for the Scene11 runtime contract.

story_prerequisites: Use a captured-world or equivalent late-family source state
Preserve the natural progression state from that source
hero_state: Twinsen on foot in the save's natural captured-world state
generation_spec.interaction_boundary: Prefer saving immediately after reaching the room from the captured-world source state.

visual_verification.validation_method: Load the save, capture the loaded-scene screenshot, and have Codex compare it against these cues in-chat before the save is treated as valid proof input.
visual_verification.screenshot_step: After loading the save, capture a screenshot before normalizing the state further.
mismatch_examples: The loaded room is not Neighbour's House

operator_generation_instructions: Start from a captured-world late-family save if that is the family under test.
Travel to Neighbour's House.
Save inside the room without normalizing the state further.
Record the source save family used to derive it.
After loading the save for proof work, take a screenshot and compare it against this profile's visual verification cues.

story_prerequisites: No specific story era is currently required for the baseline Tavern proof
hero_state: Twinsen in the save's natural state
generation_spec.interaction_boundary: Saving inside the room is enough unless a narrower Tavern experiment says otherwise.

visual_verification.validation_method: Load the save, capture the loaded-scene screenshot, and have Codex compare it against these cues in-chat before the save is treated as valid proof input.

expected_visual_cues: The loaded room is Chez Luc rather than the outside landing-zone scene
mismatch_examples: The loaded scene is outside the Tavern
The loaded room is not Chez Luc

operator_generation_instructions: Reach the Tavern in any valid story state.
Create the save inside the room.
Record the rough progression era if known.
After loading the save for proof work, take a screenshot and compare it against this profile's visual verification cues.

profiles.proof_goal: Tavern proof in the lightning-spell / Sendell-ball story family.

generation_spec.story_arc: Pre-Moon Twinsun family around the lightning spell and Sendell's Ball
story_prerequisites: Twinsen has the lightning spell or is in the immediate sequence where Tavern leads into the sewer / Sendell's Ball path
hero_state: Preserve the natural pre-Moon state for this story sequence
generation_spec.interaction_boundary: Prefer saving before clearing the Tavern-local sequence if the goal is to probe that story family directly.

visual_verification.validation_method: Load the save, capture the loaded-scene screenshot, and have Codex compare it against these cues in-chat before the save is treated as valid proof input.
visual_verification.screenshot_step: After loading the save, capture a screenshot before consuming the Tavern-local Sendell-ball sequence.
mismatch_examples: The loaded scene is outside the Tavern

operator_generation_instructions: Reach the phase where the lightning spell and Sendell's Ball path runs through the Tavern.
Enter the Tavern and save inside the room before over-normalizing the sequence.
Record that this is the Sendell-ball Tavern family.
After loading the save for proof work, take a screenshot and compare it against this profile's visual verification cues.

profiles.proof_goal: Weather-mage proof for the lightning-spell step that feeds the Sendell story family.

generation_spec.story_arc: Pre-Moon Twinsun family at the weather-mage / lightning-spell completion step
story_prerequisites: Twinsen has returned from Zeelich and reached the weather-mage follow-up on Twinsun
The active goal is to complete or immediately verify the lightning spell before the Tavern / sewer / Sendell path
hero_state: Preserve the natural pre-Moon state for this spell-completion sequence
generation_spec.interaction_boundary: Prefer saving before leaving the tent for the Tavern / Sendell path, and before over-normalizing the spell-completion sequence.

visual_verification.validation_method: Load the save, capture the loaded-scene screenshot, and have Codex compare it against these cues in-chat before the save is treated as valid proof input.

expected_visual_cues: Twinsen is inside the Wizard's Tent
mismatch_examples: The loaded room is not the Wizard's Tent
The loaded room is already on the Tavern or sewer part of the Sendell path

operator_generation_instructions: Reach the weather-mage follow-up where the lightning spell is completed.
Create the save inside the Wizard's Tent before leaving for the Tavern / Sendell path.
Record whether the pearl step is already complete and whether this is meant to prove the lightning-spell handoff specifically.
After loading the save for proof work, take a screenshot and compare it against this profile's visual verification cues.

profiles.proof_goal: Pre-room sewer proof for the lightning-spell / Sendell's Ball story family.

generation_spec.story_arc: Pre-Moon Twinsun family between Tavern and the actual Sendell's Ball room
story_prerequisites: The Tavern-local sequence has already moved into the sewer / pyramid-key path toward Sendell's Ball
hero_state: Preserve the natural pre-Moon state for this story sequence
Prefer Twinsen on foot with enough magic or nearby refill access to complete the room transition
generation_spec.room_requirement: Save inside the Sewers on the Sendell's Ball approach
generation_spec.interaction_boundary: Prefer saving before entering the final cave or room that contains Sendell's Ball so the transition and trigger sequence can still be observed.

visual_verification.validation_method: Load the save, capture the loaded-scene screenshot, and have Codex compare it against these cues in-chat before the save is treated as valid proof input.
visual_verification.screenshot_step: After loading the save, capture a screenshot before entering the final Sendell's Ball room.
expected_visual_cues: The loaded room is not the Tavern and not yet the actual Sendell's Ball room
mismatch_examples: The loaded scene is outside the Sewers
The loaded room already shows the large Sendell's Ball ice sphere

operator_generation_instructions: Reach the post-lightning pre-Moon Sendell family.
Advance from the Tavern into the sewer path without consuming the final Sendell's Ball trigger.
Create the save inside the Sewers while the final room transition still remains ahead.
Record whether the pyramid-key step is already completed.
After loading the save for proof work, take a screenshot and compare it against this profile's visual verification cues.

story_prerequisites: The Sendell's Ball sewer path has progressed past the broad sewer approach and into the inner treasure-room branch
hero_state: Preserve the natural pre-Moon state for this story sequence
generation_spec.room_requirement: Save inside the Treasure room on the Sendell's Ball path
generation_spec.interaction_boundary: Prefer saving before the final room transition or before consuming the story-critical Sendell's Ball trigger.

visual_verification.validation_method: Load the save, capture the loaded-scene screenshot, and have Codex compare it against these cues in-chat before the save is treated as valid proof input.

profiles.proof_goal: Direct story-critical proof in the actual Sendell's Ball room.

generation_spec.story_arc: Pre-Moon Twinsun family at the immediate Sendell's Ball / red-ball unlock moment
story_prerequisites: Twinsen has reached the actual Sendell's Ball room behind the sewer path
hero_state: Prefer Twinsen standing near the large ice sphere before the first lightning cast
Keep enough magic to cast the lightning spell once without leaving the room
generation_spec.room_requirement: Save inside the actual Sendell's Ball room
generation_spec.interaction_boundary: Prefer saving before the first lightning cast so the original runtime can reveal whether the story-critical effect is direct state mutation, an extra spawn, or both.

visual_verification.validation_method: Load the save, capture the loaded-scene screenshot, and have Codex compare it against these cues in-chat before the save is treated as valid proof input.
visual_verification.screenshot_step: After loading the save, capture a screenshot before casting lightning on Sendell's Ball.
expected_visual_cues: Twinsen is inside the actual Sendell's Ball room
The large ice sphere containing Sendell's Ball is visible in the room
mismatch_examples: The loaded room is still the broad Sewers scene
The loaded room is the Tavern or another pre-room setup scene

operator_generation_instructions: Reach the actual Sendell's Ball room behind the Tavern and sewer path.
Stand near the large ice sphere without casting lightning yet.
Create the save with enough magic to cast lightning once.
Record whether this is intended for direct Sendell's Ball / red-ball proof.
After loading the save for proof work, take a screenshot and compare it against this profile's visual verification cues.
